title: amellus niveus
intro: Amellus niveus, also known as the snow thistle, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, characterized by its white or pink flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Amellus niveus lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Amellus niveus can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried forms, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and dietary supplements.
